name: Carl von Clausewitz
bio: Carl Philipp Gottlieb von Clausewitz was a Prussian army officer and military theorist who stressed the "moral" and political aspects of waging war. His most notable work, Vom Kriege, though unfinished at his death, is considered a seminal treatise on military strategy and science.

awards.name: Order of the Red Eagle 2nd Class
Commander Cross of the Military Order of Maria Theresa
Knight First Class of the Order of the Sword
